robots_txt.content:
User-agent: *
Disallow: /sample-*
Disallow: /blog/sample-*
Disallow:/bios2*
Disallow:/bios*
Disallow:/hubfs*
Disallow: /_hcms/preview/
Disallow: /hs/manage-preferences/
Disallow: /hs/preferences-center/
Disallow: /*?*hs_preview=*
Disallow: /*?*hsCacheBuster=*
robots_txt.note: No Sitemap: directive in robots.txt. Sitemap found separately at /sitemap.xml

sitemap.note: 568 URL entries. Many image sitemaps for hubspot media. Some entries still reference laneterralever.com images.

technology_stack.frontend_framework: Custom HTML/CSS modules + HubSpot template system
technology_stack.old_domain_assets: Assets still served from laneterralever.com via HubSpot CDN

security.note: SSL confirmed (HTTPS). No CSP meta tag found in HTML. No X-Frame-Options or other security meta tags. Server-level headers not inspected (requires server access).
issues: External scripts loaded from multiple CDN domains without SRI

findings.no_sitemap_in_robots: Missing Sitemap: directive in robots.txt — crawlers need to discover sitemap separately
findings.old_jquery: jQuery 1.7.1 is 13+ years old and has known XSS vulnerabilities
findings.cross_domain_assets: Production assets still loading from old domain laneterralever.com
findings.hubfs_blocked: robots.txt blocks /hubfs* — this blocks indexing of HubSpot-hosted media
